signals.headline: Trump Imposes Blockade on Iranian Oil Shipping in Strait of Hormuz | YES - BLOCKADE CONFIRMED | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Trump Imposes Blockade on Iranian Oil Shipping in Strait of Hormuz | YES - BLOCKADE CONFIRMED | HIGH confidence**

The United States has imposed a blockade on Iranian oil tankers in the Strait of Hormuz while allowing other international transit to proceed under strict monitoring[4]. This represents a significant escalation in pressure on Iran during ceasefire negotiations[4].

signals.raw:
